name: RUST
description:
This Docker will download and install SteamCMD. It will also install RUST and run it.

ATTENTION: First Startup can take very long since it downloads the gameserver files!

Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

You can also run multiple servers with only one SteamCMD directory!

ports.name: UDP1 - Game Port
ports.description: UDP Gameport (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to click an 'Show more settings ...)

ports.name: UDP2 - Query Port
ports.description: UDP - Query Port (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to click an 'Show more settings ...)

ports.name: TCP1 - RCON Port
ports.description: TCP RCON Port - not needed (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new TCP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to click an 'Show more settings ...)

ports.name: TCP2 - App Port
ports.description: TCP App Port (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new TCP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to click an 'Show more settings ...)

variables.name: Validate Installation
variables.description: Set the Variable to 'true' if you want to validate the installation otherwise leave it blank.

variables.name: Game Parameters
variables.description: Enter here your extra game startup parameters if needed starting with (eg: '+rcon.port 27016 +rcon.password YOURPASSWORD' don't forget to add also a new port here on the template page with container and host port set to the corresponding RCON port)

variables.name: GAME_ID
variables.description: The GAME_ID that the container downloads at startup. If you want to use a beta version of the game enter this: '258550 -beta staging' or '258550 -beta prerelease' (without quotes).

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Name of the Server goes here

variables.name: Enable Oxide Mod
variables.description: Set to 'true' (without quotes) to enable Oxide Mod, otherwise leave empty (the container will check on every start/restart if there is a newer version available).

variables.name: Enable Carbon Mod
variables.description: Set to 'true' (without quotes) to enable Carbon Mod, otherwise leave empty (the container will check on every start/restart if there is a newer version available).

variables.name: GAME_PORT
variables.description: Game port on which the server is running (has to match the port mapping in your container).

variables.name: QUERY_PORT
variables.description: Query port on which the server is running (has to match the port mapping in your container).

variables.name: RCON_PORT
variables.description: RCON port on which the server is running (has to match the port mapping in your container).

variables.name: APP_PORT
variables.description: App port on which the server is running (has to match the port mapping in your container).
